message:
Switch to WASM-based tree-sitter

Use web-tree-sitter instead of native tree-sitter bindings to eliminate
the need for C++ compilation. This simplifies the build setup as no
compiler toolchain is required.

- Replace tree-sitter with web-tree-sitter
- Update tree-sitter-tql to 1.0.0 (includes WASM build)
- Remove unused tree-sitter-yaml dependency
- Simplify postinstall script

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
